hypothesis:
## Novel Hypothesis

Contrastive multimodal pretraining between SMILES and 3D electron densities will induce emergent chirality-awareness in molecular embeddings, enabling the model to distinguish enantiomers without explicit stereochemical labels, when trained on a dataset where SMILES strings encode stereochemistry (e.g., using R/S or @/@@ notation) but 3D conformers are presented in randomly mirrored orientations.
